title: L’articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook - Terzogiornale
Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino
snippet: The article highlights a study by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, which found that Facebook's algorithm rewards extremist content while penalizing institutional political communication.
description: An article from Lumsanews highlighting a study by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, which found that Facebook's algorithm rewards extremist content while penalizing institutional political communication.

title: Less political content in feeds, Meta's clampdown less effective against extremists - Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: The article reports on a research study by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, which found that Facebook's algorithm has significantly reduced the visibility of institutional political content while amplifying extremist, anti-European, pro-Russian, and conspiracy-theory content between 2021 and 2025.
description: The article reports on a research study by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, highlighting how Facebook's algorithm has reduced the visibility of institutional political content while amplifying extremist views.

title: Algoritmi Meta, più spazio agli estremisti e meno alla politica ufficiale
snippet: This news piece details an independent academic study led by Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, which analyzed over 2.5 million Facebook posts from 2021 to 2025. The study revealed that Meta's algorithms have given more visibility to extremist and anti-European content, while official political communication has seen a significant reduction in reach.
description: This news piece reports on an academic study led by Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, which found that Meta's algorithms disproportionately amplify extremist and anti-European content while reducing the reach of official political communication.

title: Researchers meet to discuss DSA access to publicly available platform data
snippet: Fabio Giglietto, from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, is listed as an expert in a group that met with ECAT and DG Connect on November 13, 2025, to discuss DSA access to publicly available platform data for researching systemic risks in the EU.
description: Fabio Giglietto, from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, participated as an expert in a meeting with ECAT and DG Connect to discuss DSA access to publicly available platform data for researching systemic risks in the EU.
